---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, sample projects where this would help, links to related issues, etc.

## Type (optional)

- [ ] New specialist reviewer role
- [ ] New integration detector
- [ ] New language parser
- [ ] New script / phase
- [ ] User-facing UX improvement
- [ ] Other
